cmd:
K=$(grep -E '^N8N_API_KEY=' /root/Iryna_Karmazina/.env | tail -1 | cut -d= -f2-)
WID=JQKA35haUsXU4XqE
curl -s -m 30 -H "X-N8N-API-KEY: $K" https://irynakarmazina.app.n8n.cloud/api/v1/workflows/$WID -o /tmp/mk.json
cp /tmp/mk.json /root/mk-backup-$WID.json
echo "backup bytes: $(wc -c < /root/mk-backup-$WID.json)"
echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/rozbir_new.js
python3 - "$K" "$WID" << 'PYEOF'
import json,sys,urllib.request,urllib.error
K,WID=sys.argv[1],sys.argv[2]
d=json.load(open('/tmp/mk.json'))
newcode=open('/tmp/rozbir_new.js',encoding='utf-8').read()
found=False
for n in d['nodes']:
    if n.get('name')=='Розбір' and n.get('type')=='n8n-nodes-base.code':
        n.setdefault('parameters',{})['jsCode']=newcode; found=True
print('patched:',found)
if found:
    payload={'name':d['name'],'nodes':d['nodes'],'connections':d['connections'],'settings':d.get('settings',{})}
    if d.get('staticData') is not None: payload['staticData']=d['staticData']
    body=json.dumps(payload).encode('utf-8')
    req=urllib.request.Request('https://irynakarmazina.app.n8n.cloud/api/v1/workflows/'+WID,data=body,method='PUT',headers={'X-N8N-API-KEY':K,'Content-Type':'application/json'})
    try:
        r=urllib.request.urlopen(req,timeout=40); print('PUT',r.status)
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
        print('PUT ERR',e.code,e.read()[:400])
PYEOF
curl -s -m 20 -H "X-N8N-API-KEY: $K" -X POST https://irynakarmazina.app.n8n.cloud/api/v1/workflows/$WID/activate -o /dev/null -w "activate HTTP %{http_code}\n"
curl -s -m 25 -H "X-N8N-API-KEY: $K" https://irynakarmazina.app.n8n.cloud/api/v1/workflows/$WID -o /tmp/mk2.json
python3 -c "import json;d=json.load(open('/tmp/mk2.json'));ns=[x for x in d['nodes'] if x.get('name')=='Розбір'];c=ns[0]['parameters']['jsCode'] if ns else '';print('verify new-status present:', 'авто/потяг' in c, '| old-status gone:', 'сухій порт' not in c, '| active:', d.get('active'))"
